title: Pet Munchies Duck Dog Training Treats, Grain Free Tasty Bites with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat 50g
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL DUCK: This tasty treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade duck breast meat - made from the finest ingredients and delicately baked to perfection in their own natural juices
THE PERFECT TRAINING AID: Give as a reward on walks or at home for recall and training or simply for pleasure, all dogs love the taste of these tasty bites

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our duck training treats are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet
HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: Naturally low in fat and salt and wheat and gluten free - these treats are the perfect healthy snack to feed your four legged friends

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎‎Store in a cool, dry place. Re-seal pack after use
